title: DESIGN.md as agent-readable design contract
summary: Serious teams treat DESIGN.md (or DESIGN_SYSTEM.md) plus AGENTS.md as the agent-readable visual/logic contract, with CI enforcement and collections like awesome-design-md. Recurring in Vercel-adjacent and agentic coding discussions.
promotionBlockedReason: Emerging social signal; corroborate with primary product docs and multi-repo adoption before promoting new canon beyond rule.ai.generative-boundaries.
